standort.label: Standort des Schadens
standort.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.

strassenname.label: Straßenname
strassenname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

hausnummer.label: Hausnummer
hausnummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

postleitzahl.label: Postleitzahl
postleitzahl.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

stadt.label: Stadt
stadt.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

schadenskategorie.label: Art des Schadens
schadenskategorie.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Schadenskategorien' with the id `69aa94cd14f0020132b9f814` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69aa94cd14f0020132b9f814/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

schadensbeschreibung.label: Detaillierte Beschreibung
schadensbeschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

dringlichkeit.label: Dringlichkeit
dringlichkeit.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

fotos.label: Fotos des Schadens
fotos.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69aa94d22b55ea916c62c4ee/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

melder_vorname.label: Vorname
melder_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

melder_nachname.label: Nachname
melder_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

melder_telefon.label: Telefonnummer
melder_telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

meldedatum.label: Meldedatum
meldedatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

kategoriename.label: Kategoriename
kategoriename.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

prioritaetsstufe.label: Standard-Prioritätsstufe
prioritaetsstufe.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

schadensmeldung_referenz.label: Schadensmeldung
schadensmeldung_referenz.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Schadensmeldung' with the id `69aa94d22b55ea916c62c4ee` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69aa94d22b55ea916c62c4ee/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

aktueller_status.label: Aktueller Status
aktueller_status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

statusdatum.label: Statusdatum
statusdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

bearbeitungskommentar.label: Kommentar zur Bearbeitung
bearbeitungskommentar.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

bearbeiter_vorname.label: Bearbeiter Vorname
bearbeiter_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

bearbeiter_nachname.label: Bearbeiter Nachname
bearbeiter_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).
